name: Carrot Bran Brownies
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Amaranth Whole Wheat Pastry Flour
recipeInstructions:
-------------------------------APRICOT GLAZE-------------------------------
2 cups Pitted & Chopped Apricots (Fresh)
1 Lemon with Peel, Chopped
1/3 cup Honey or Maple Syrup
Mix dry ingredients together and stir in nuts and carrot. Beat liquids and stir into dry mixture. Spread batter into an oiled 8-inch x 8-inch pan. Bake at 375°F for 30 minutes. Serve warm or top with apricot glaze (recipe below).
Apricot Glaze: Combine ingredients in a saucepan and stir over medium-low heat until apricots become juicy. Pour into a blender and puree; return to saucepan and cook for 5-8 minutes. Cool and spread on top of cake or cookies.
